calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel P. Iannitelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Vitus Chow, an indivndual, and with plaintiff Vincent Chow, an individual, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Shelford Corporation, a California corporation, Shelford, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company or Edward Wilson, a/k/a Edward Disani Wilison, a/k/a Edward George Disani Wilson, a/k/a Edward D. Wilson, a/k/;a Edward G. D. Wilson, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 11, 2009.
Order waiving the appearance of plaintiff Vitus Chow at today's hearing was filed on August 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Vincent Chow, an individual, and Vitus Chow, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendants Shelford Corporation, a California corporation, Shelford, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company or Edward Wilson, a/k/a Edward Disani Wilison, a/k/a Edward George Disani Wilson, a/k/a Edward D. Wilson, a/k/;a Edward G. D. Wilson, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $63,791.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $44,314.66.
Attorney's Fees - $30,111.00.
Insufficient Funds Damages - $10,725.00.
Costs - $1,256.43320.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $150,198.14.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
